zh.Kendal, Westmorland, England: 英國維斯特莫藍德肯達爾
zh.Catterick, Yorkshire, England, United Ki: 英國英格蘭越可爾卡特利可
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Braithwait於1623年9月25日出生在英國維斯特莫藍德肯達爾時，她的父親Richard Braithwaite36歲，母親Frances Lawson27歲。她於大約1650年與Edward Massey在英國爾伯頓結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1666年5月23日在英國爾伯頓享年42歲，埋葬在英國爾伯頓。

zh-hans.Catterick, Yorkshire, England, United Ki: 英国英格兰越可爾卡特利可
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Braithwait于1623年9月25日出生在英国維斯特莫藍德肯達爾时，她的父亲Richard Braithwaite36岁，母亲Frances Lawson27岁。她于大约1650年与Edward Massey在英国爾伯頓结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1666年5月23日在英国爾伯頓享年42岁，埋葬在英国爾伯頓。

nameMeanings.name: Braithwait
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Braithwaite
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from any of the places in Cumbria and Yorkshire named Braithwaite, from Old Norse breithr ‘broad’ + thveit ‘clearing’.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Braithwait was born on 25 September 1623, in Kendal, Westmorland, England, her father, Richard Braithwaite, was 36 and her mother, Frances Lawson, was 27. She married Edward Massey about 1650, in Burton, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 23 May 1666, in Burton, Cheshire, England, at the age of 42, and was buried in Burton, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Braithwait est née le 25 septembre 1623, à Kendal, Westmorland, Angleterre, son père, Richard Braithwaite, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Frances Lawson, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Edward Massey environ 1650, à Burton, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 23 mai 1666, à Burton, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterrée à Burton, Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Braithwait am 25. September 1623 in Kendal, Westmorland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Braithwaite 36 und ihre Mutter Frances Lawson 27. Sie hat um 1650 in Burton, Cheshire, England Edward Massey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 23. Mai 1666 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Burton, Cheshire, England und wurde in Burton, Cheshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Braithwait è nata il il 25 settembre 1623 nel Kendal, Westmorland, England, sua padre, Richard Braithwaite, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Frances Lawson, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Edward Massey circa 1650, nel Burton, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 23 maggio 1666, nel Burton, Cheshire, England, all'età di 42 anni, e fu sepolta a Burton, Cheshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Braithwaitが1623年9月25日にイギリスウエストモーランドケンダルで生まれた時，父Richard Braithwaiteは36歳，母Frances Lawsonは27歳であった。約1650年にイギリスチェシュアイアブルトンでEdward Masseyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1666年5月23日にイギリスチェシュアイアブルトンで42歳で死去し，イギリスチェシュアイアブルトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Braithwait(이)가 1623년 9월 25일 영국 웨스트모를랜드 켄다에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Braithwaite(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Frances Lawson(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 대략 1650년 영국 체실르 버턴에서 Edward Massey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1666년 5월 23일 영국 체실르 버턴에서 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 체실르 버턴에 묻혔다.

pt.25 September 1623–23 May 1666: 25 de setembro de 1623–23 de maio de 1666
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Braithwait nasceu em 25 de setembro de 1623, em Kendal, Westmorland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Braithwaite, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Frances Lawson, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Edward Massey aproximadamente 1650, em Burton, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 23 de maio de 1666, em Burton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 42 anos, e foi sepultada em Burton, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Braithwait родилась 25 сентября 1623 г. в местности кендаль, вестморланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard Braithwaite было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Frances Lawson, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edward Massey около 1650 г. в местности буртон, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 23 мая 1666 г. в местности буртон, чешир, Англия в возрасте 42 лет и была похоронена в местности буртон, чешир, Англия.

es.25 September 1623–23 May 1666: 25 de septiembre de 1623–23 de mayo de 1666
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Braithwait nació el 25 de septiembre de 1623, en Kendal, Westmorland, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Braithwaite, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Frances Lawson, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Edward Massey aproximadamente 1650, en Burton, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 23 de mayo de 1666, en Burton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 42 años, y fue sepultada en Burton, Cheshire, Inglaterra.
